0.text: Peripheral ground-glass opacities with interlobular septal thickening in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Peripheral ground-glass opacities with interlobular septal thickening in the middle lobe on the right

2.text: Peripheral ground-glass opacities with interlobular septal thickening in the lingular segment on the left

3.text: Peripheral ground-glass opacities with interlobular septal thickening in the anterior segments of the upper lobe on the left
